visual_description: A gold Rolex watch with a white dial rests on a dark surface. The view changes to a close‑up of a fire burning inside a metal container, showing bright orange flames and glowing embers. A gloved hand reaches toward the fire, adjusting the burning material while a shoe sits on the floor nearby.
audio_description: Crackling fire sounds are audible, accompanied by a low ambient hum.
